title: Pottery — Wheel Throwing
description: Throw on the wheel with one-on-one guidance from our resident potter.

title: Terrarium
description: Layer moss, soil, stones, and living plants into a glass ecosystem.

title: Mosaic
description: Work with ceramic tile fragments, glass pieces, and stone.

title: Weaving
description: Learn frame loom weaving — warp, weft, colour sequencing, finishing.

title: Gardening for Kids
description: Children plant, pot, and care for their own seedlings.

title: Air-dry Clay
description: Pinch, coil, and sculpt with air-dry clay using three techniques.

title: Candle Making
description: Blend scents, choose vessels, and pour your own candles with natural wax.

title: Resin Decor
description: Pour, swirl, and embed — create pieces that preserve colour and memory.

title: Glass Painting
description: Transparent pigments on glass — when light passes through, it transforms.

title: Glow in the Dark
description: Paint in UV-reactive pigments that glow when the lights go off.

title: Soap Felting
description: Wrap soap in wet wool and agitate until the fibres mat around it.

title: Surrealism Painting
description: Guided exercises in automatic drawing and dream imagery.

title: Art for Emotional Expression
description: A safe, guided space to use mark-making as language for feeling.

title: Hat Painting
description: Start with a plain straw hat. Finish with something entirely your own.

title: Open Art Days
description: Studio time with materials, space, and absolutely no agenda.

title: Realism Painting
description: Structured classes in observational drawing and realistic painting.

title: Jewellery Making
description: Silver wire, beads, stones, and your own hands.

title: Crochet
description: Learn to crochet from the first slip knot to a finished piece.

title: Mini House Building
description: Construct a miniature architectural model — walls, windows, roofline.

title: Wood Carving
description: Work with basswood and carving knives to remove what doesn't belong.
